context: Verify that the agent produces a publication-readiness verdict, benchmarks against conference standards, and provides a prioritised revision list.

checklist.name: All ScholarEval dimensions assessed
checklist.description: The agent evaluates all 7+ core dimensions before rendering a readiness verdict.

checklist.name: Conference-level benchmark applied
checklist.description: The agent adjusts expectations to top-tier conference standards, not generic publication standards.

checklist.name: Clear readiness verdict provided
checklist.description: The agent explicitly states ready / needs minor revisions / needs major revisions with a rationale.

checklist.name: Aggregate score calculated
checklist.description: The agent provides a numeric overall score or summary score alongside the qualitative verdict.

checklist.name: Prioritised revision list produced
checklist.description: Recommended revisions are ranked by impact/effort and are specific enough to act on immediately.
